description_long: This is a vibrant necklace composed of a series of round, faceted beads in a striking red-orange hue, strung together in a graduated pattern. The beads are largest at the center and gradually decrease in size toward the clasp, creating a balanced and elegant silhouette. The necklace is displayed on a smooth, matte-finished bust stand, which accentuates the vivid color and uniformity of the beads. Each bead appears to be polished, reflecting light with a subtle gloss, and the stringing is tight and even, suggesting careful craftsmanship. The overall design is classic and symmetrical, with no visible pendant or additional adornments. The necklace exudes a timeless, geometric motif, making it suitable for both casual and formal urban settings.
description: A classic red-orange beaded necklace with graduated, polished round beads, displayed on a bust stand. The design is symmetrical and vibrant, with a smooth, glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full graduated arrangement of red-orange beads, largest at the center and tapering toward the ends.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the necklace's curvature and the even spacing of the beads along the neckline.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the uniformity of the smaller beads and the way the necklace sits around the back of the neck.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, emphasizing the symmetrical tapering of bead sizes and the necklace's drape.
